news.title: Saregama India Ltd incorporates a subsidiary in Dubai for performing arts and music festivals.
news.summary: Saregama India Ltd incorporates a subsidiary in Dubai for performing arts and music festivals.

news.title:
Saregama India posts Q3FY26 revenue of INR 260 cr, PBT at INR 76.5 cr.
Music segment grew 29% YoY; AI tools cut video release time; 60 artists added.
news.summary:
Saregama India posts Q3FY26 revenue of INR 260 cr, PBT at INR 76.5 cr.
Music segment grew 29% YoY; AI tools cut video release time; 60 artists added.

news.title:
Saregama India CFO Pankaj Chaturvedi resigns, effective 31 March 2026, citing personal reasons.
The company confirmed no material reasons behind the resignation as per regulatory requirements.
news.summary:
Saregama India CFO Pankaj Chaturvedi resigns, effective 31 March 2026, citing personal reasons.
The company confirmed no material reasons behind the resignation as per regulatory requirements.

news.title:
Saregama India surged 7.2% on 9 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 349.4 intraday high.
The rally outperformed Media sector by 4.9% and Sensex, which gained 0.4%.
news.summary:
Saregama India surged 7.2% on 9 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 349.4 intraday high.
The rally outperformed Media sector by 4.9% and Sensex, which gained 0.4%.

news.title:
Saregama India Ltd announces participation in Nuvama India Investor Conference on 10th Feb 2026 in Mumbai.
The announcement complies with SEBI Listing Regulations and is available on the company's website.
news.summary:
Saregama India Ltd announces participation in Nuvama India Investor Conference on 10th Feb 2026 in Mumbai.
The announcement complies with SEBI Listing Regulations and is available on the company's website.

news.title:
Saregama India's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹918M from ₹848M YoY.
EBITDA margin surged to 35.3% from 17.5% YoY.
news.summary:
Saregama India's Q3 EBITDA rose to ₹918M from ₹848M YoY.
EBITDA margin surged to 35.3% from 17.5% YoY.

news.title:
Saregama India Ltd acquired 9,960 CCPS in Bhansali Productions for INR 325 Cr.
The acquisition aims to boost Saregama's content and production capabilities.
news.summary:
Saregama India Ltd acquired 9,960 CCPS in Bhansali Productions for INR 325 Cr.
The acquisition aims to boost Saregama's content and production capabilities.

news.title:
Saregama India Ltd schedules Q3FY26 analyst/investor call on Feb 3, 2026, at 5:00 PM IST.
Key executives, including MD Vikram Mehra, will discuss financial/operational performance during the call.
news.summary:
Saregama India Ltd schedules Q3FY26 analyst/investor call on Feb 3, 2026, at 5:00 PM IST.
Key executives, including MD Vikram Mehra, will discuss financial/operational performance during the call.

news.title:
Saregama India's board meeting is scheduled for 3rd Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-results declaration.
news.summary:
Saregama India's board meeting is scheduled for 3rd Feb 2026 to review Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed for designated persons until 48 hours post-results declaration.

news.title:
Nifty trades in a 25,700-26,100 range amid rupee weakness and US trade deal uncertainties.
Focus on stock-specific updates, including ICICI Prudential AMC IPO allotment and activities in Saregama, Akzo Nobel, and Vedanta.
news.summary:

Saregama India to invest ₹325 cr in Bhansali Productions.
The investment involves 9,960 CCPS, as per the stock exchange filing.
news.summary:

news.title:
Saregama India Ltd's senior management to hold an investor call on Dec 16, 2025, at 5:30 PM IST.
No UPSI will be shared during the call. The schedule was finalized and shared at short notice.
news.summary:

news.title:
Saregama India approves BPPL acquisition via CCPS at INR 325 Cr.
The deal targets up to 51% stake to expand video and music licensing.
news.summary:
Saregama India approves BPPL acquisition via CCPS at INR 325 Cr.
The deal targets up to 51% stake to expand video and music licensing.

news.title:
Saregama India acquires equity in Bhansali Productions; gains exclusive film music rights.
The partnership boosts content slate and is EPS accretive by FY27.
news.summary:
Saregama India acquires equity in Bhansali Productions; gains exclusive film music rights.
The partnership boosts content slate and is EPS accretive by FY27.

news.title:
91 lakh shares of Saregama India were traded yesterday, indicating high activity.
Gillette India recorded its highest trading volume since May, showcasing investor interest.
news.summary:
91 lakh shares of Saregama India were traded yesterday, indicating high activity.

news.title:
Capital Group acquired a 3.03% stake in CarTrade Tech for Rs 440 crore; shares priced at Rs 3044.58.
Amansa Capital sold a 1.3% stake in Saregama India for Rs 95 crore; shares closed 4.4% higher at Rs 397.
news.summary:
Capital Group acquired a 3.03% stake in CarTrade Tech for Rs 440 crore; shares priced at Rs 3044.58.
Amansa Capital sold a 1.3% stake in Saregama India for Rs 95 crore; shares closed 4.4% higher at Rs 397.

news.title:
Saregama's Pocket Aces Pictures acquires Finnet Media via 100% equity share purchase.
Finnet Media now becomes a wholly owned subsidiary of Saregama India Ltd.
news.summary:
Saregama's Pocket Aces Pictures acquires Finnet Media via 100% equity share purchase.
Finnet Media now becomes a wholly owned subsidiary of Saregama India Ltd.

news.title:
Saregama India Ltd reported Q2 FY26 revenue of INR 230 crores and PBT of INR 60 crores, with growth in music and challenges in the video segment.
The company is leveraging AI for music video creation, strengthening artist management, and exploring subscription models for sustained growth.
news.summary:
Saregama India Ltd reported Q2 FY26 revenue of INR 230 crores and PBT of INR 60 crores, with growth in music and challenges in the video segment.
The company is leveraging AI for music video creation, strengthening artist management, and exploring subscription models for sustained growth.

news.title:
Last day to buy shares of Garden Reach, Nuvama, Metropolis, Chambal Fertilisers, Saregama, Siyaram, and Astral for dividend eligibility is Nov. 10.
Dividends announced: Garden Reach Rs 5.75, Nuvama Rs 70, Metropolis Rs 4, Chambal Rs 5, Saregama Rs 4.50, Siyaram Rs 4, Astral Rs 1.50 per share.
news.summary:
Last day to buy shares of Garden Reach, Nuvama, Metropolis, Chambal Fertilisers, Saregama, Siyaram, and Astral for dividend eligibility is Nov. 10.
Dividends announced: Garden Reach Rs 5.75, Nuvama Rs 70, Metropolis Rs 4, Chambal Rs 5, Saregama Rs 4.50, Siyaram Rs 4, Astral Rs 1.50 per share.

news.title:
Saregama Q2 profit dips 2% YoY to ₹43.8 crore; revenue down 5%.
Part of RP Sanjiv Goenka Group, profit fell from ₹44.9 crore YoY.
news.summary:
Saregama Q2 profit dips 2% YoY to ₹43.8 crore; revenue down 5%.
